Receive Buffer / Transmit Holding / Divisor Latch Low

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

DLAB=0, read: Receive Buffer Register (RBR) - received data byte. DLAB=0, write: Transmit Holding Register (THR) - data byte to transmit. DLAB=1: Divisor Latch Low (DLL) - lower 8 bits of baud rate divisor. Baud rate = serial_clock_freq / (16 * {DLH,DLL}).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7:0] data rw - DATA
